HELIOS - HomogEneous and Layered medIa Optical Scattering
C++ surface integral equation (SIE) code for homogeneous and layered media scattering

28#define GREENFLAYERED3D_H

30#include <blitz/array.h>
31#include <cmath>

34#include "GreenF.h"

37#include "SingCancellation.h"

58class GreenFLayered3D : public GreenF {
59 private:
60 // ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
61 // -------------------------- Layer stack & tabulation --------------------------
62 // ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
63 std::vector<dcmplx> epsilon;
64 std::vector<dcmplx> mu;
65 std::vector<double> zValsInterfaces;
66 std::vector<double> thickness;
67 std::vector<Grid> tabulationGrids;
68 int midLayerIndex;
69 LayeredMediaUtils* layeredUtils;
70
71 // Interpolation coeffs (grouped by interaction type)
72 std::vector<CoeffsIntra> coeffIntraTB;
73 std::vector<CoeffsIntra> coeffIntraMinus;
74 std::vector<CoeffsIntra> coeffIntraPlus;
75 std::vector<CoeffsInter> coeffInter;
76
77 // Indices linking triangles/layers to coefficient sets
78 std::vector<int> intraTBIndex;
79 std::vector<int> intraPMIndex;
80 std::vector<std::complex<int>> interIndeces;
81
82 // Per‑case Sommerfeld integrators (smooth parts)
83 std::vector<SommerfeldIntegrator*> sommIntIntraTB;
84 std::vector<SommerfeldIntegrator*> sommIntIntraMinus;
85 std::vector<SommerfeldIntegrator*> sommIntIntraPlus;
86 std::vector<SommerfeldIntegrator*> sommIntInter;
87
88 bool enableLineIntegrals = false;
89
90 GaussQuad<GreenFLayered3D> gauss;
91
92 public:
93 // -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
94 // ------------------------------- Thresholds ----------------------------------
95 // -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
102 bool AboveThreshold(rvec r, rvec rp);
103
110 bool AboveThreshold(rvec r, Triangle* Tp);
111
118 bool AboveThreshold(Triangle* T, Triangle* Tp);
119
120 // -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
121 // ---------------------------- Constructors/destructors -----------------------
122 // -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
133 GreenFLayered3D(dcmplx inWavelength,
134 const std::vector<dcmplx>& inEpsilonMedium,
135 const std::vector<double>& inZValsInterfaces,
136 const std::vector<double>& inThickness,
137 const std::vector<Grid>& inTabulationGrids,
138 const bool enableLineInt = false,
139 int inMidLayerIndex = 0);
140
152 GreenFLayered3D(dcmplx inWavelength,
153 const std::vector<dcmplx>& inEpsilonMedium,
154 const std::vector<dcmplx>& inMuMedium,
155 const std::vector<double>& inZValsInterfaces,
156 const std::vector<double>& inThickness,
157 const std::vector<Grid>& inTabulationGrids,
158 const bool enableLineInt = false,
159 int inMidLayerIndex = 0);
160
162 virtual ~GreenFLayered3D(){ delete layeredUtils; layeredUtils = nullptr; };
163
164 // -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
165 // ---------------------------- Geometry helpers -------------------------------
166 // -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
172 int GetLayerIndex(rvec pos) const;
173
178 void writeGridsToFile(const std::string& filename, const std::vector<Grid>& grids);
179
180 // -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
181 // -------------------------- Layered medium helper ----------------------------
182 // -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
187 LayeredMediaUtils* getLayeredUtils() { return layeredUtils; }
188
189 // -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
190 // ----------------------------- Pointwise kernels -----------------------------
191 // -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
198 virtual dcmplx Evaluate(rvec r, rvec rp);
199
206 virtual cdyad EvaluateDyadic(rvec r, rvec rp);
207
215 cdyad EvaluateDyadic(rvec r, rvec rp, std::string dyadicType);
216
223 virtual cvec Gradient(rvec r, rvec rp);
224
231 virtual std::tuple<dcmplx, cvec, cdyad> EvaluateAll(rvec r, rvec rp);
232
239 virtual dcmplx Smoothed(rvec r, rvec rp);
240
247 virtual dcmplx halfSmoothed(rvec r, rvec rp);
248
255 virtual cvec GradientSmoothed(rvec r, rvec rp);
256
257 // -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
258 // ------------------------------- Integrals -----------------------------------
259 // -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
268 virtual dcmplx IntegrateD(RWGFun* f, RWGFun* fp);
269
278 virtual dcmplx IntegrateK(RWGFun* f, RWGFun* fp);
279
286 virtual cvec IntegrateDelta(rvec r, RWGFun* fp);
287
294 virtual cvec IntegrateKappa(rvec r, RWGFun* fp);
295
303 virtual std::pair<dcmplx, dcmplx> PairD(RWGFun* f, RWGFun* fp);
304
312 virtual std::pair<dcmplx, dcmplx> PairK(RWGFun* f, RWGFun* fp);
313
314 // -------------------------- Batched assembly helpers --------------------------
324 virtual void SameTriDK(const std::vector<RWGFun*>& fvec,
325 const std::vector<RWGFun*>& fpvec,
326 std::vector<std::vector<std::pair<dcmplx, dcmplx>>>& DK);
335 virtual void SameTriDKG(const std::vector<RWGFun*>& fvec,
336 const std::vector<RWGFun*>& fpvec,
337 std::vector<std::vector<std::pair<dcmplx, dcmplx>>>& DK,
338 std::vector<std::vector<std::pair<cvec, cvec>>>& DKG);
339
348 virtual void SameTriDeltaKappa(rvec r, const std::vector<RWGFun*>& fpvec,
349 std::vector<std::pair<cvec, cvec>>& DeltaKappa);
350
351 // ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------
352 // -------------------------- Tabulation and interpolation --------------------------
353 // ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------
362 std::vector<dcmplx> FresnelCoeff(int layerIndexI, int layerIndexJ,
363 dcmplx krho, const std::string& waves) const;
364
371 void FillIntraTopBottom(const dcmplx& rq_te, const dcmplx& rq_tm, const Grid& inGrid);
372
379 void FillIntraInside(const std::vector<dcmplx>& rq_te,
380 const std::vector<dcmplx>& rq_tm, const Grid& inGrid);
381
388 void FillInter(const dcmplx& tq_te, const dcmplx& tq_tm, const Grid& inGrid);
389
395 void FillGreenFTable();
396
404 void testFillGreenFTable(const std::string& intraTBType, const std::string& intraPMType,
405 const std::string& interType, const int& numPoints);
406
419 double evaluateSinglePoint(double x, double y,
420 std::tuple<std::vector<dcmplx>, std::vector<int>, std::vector<int>,
421 std::vector<double>, std::vector<double>>& inCoeffs,
422 std::string type);
423
437 double evaluateSinglePoint(
438 double x, double y, double z,
439 std::tuple<std::vector<double>, std::vector<double>, std::vector<double>,
440 std::vector<dcmplx>>& inCoeffs,
441 std::string type);
442
450 void writeVectorToFile(const std::vector<double>& x, const std::vector<double>& y,
451 const std::vector<dcmplx>& inVec, const std::string& filename);
452
459 void writeVectorToFile(const std::vector<rvec>& rho, const std::vector<double>& inVec,
460 const std::string& filename);
461
470 void writeVectorToFile(const std::vector<double>& x, const std::vector<double>& y,
471 const std::vector<double>& z, const std::vector<dcmplx>& inVec,
472 const std::string& filename);
473
493 std::map<std::string,dcmplx> evalGreenSmoothIntra(const std::string& interactionType,
494 double R, double Z1, double Z2,
495 int coeffIndex);
496
513 std::map<std::string,dcmplx> evalGreenSmoothInter(double R, double Z1, double Z2,
514 int coeffIndex);
515
533 std::map<std::string, dcmplx> evalGreenQSIntra(const rvec pos, const std::string& interactionType,
534 double rho, double Z1, double Z2, double R1, double R2,
535 bool singCancFields = false);
536
550 std::map<std::string, dcmplx> evalGreenQSInter(const rvec pos1, const rvec pos2,
551 double rho, double Z, double R,
552 bool singCancFields = false);
553
561 void testSameTriDK(std::vector<rvec> verts1, std::vector<rvec> verts2,
562 std::string gType, std::string vertPrint);
563};
564
565#endif
GaussQuad.h
Gaussian quadrature helpers for Green's functions and incident fields.
GreenF.h
Abstract base class for electromagnetic Green's functions.
SingCancellation.h
Quadrature point/weight builders for singularity-cancellation on triangles.
SommerfeldIntegrator.h
Declaration of the SommerfeldIntegrator class, which evaluates Sommerfeld-type integrals for layered ...
TriQuadPol.h
Polar quadrature on a single triangle around an observation point.
GaussQuad
Gaussian-quadrature helpers for Green's functions and incident fields.
